prompt_text:
### Demographics: 42-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 6 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: Reports 1-2 mild hypoglycemia episodes per month (self-resolved); no DKA/HHS signs; Mild dyspepsia and bloating

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3b (30-44)
Heart failure: HFrEF (NYHA Class II)
Body mass index category: Overweight
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Community-acquired pneumonia (resolved)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3b (30-44); HF: HFrEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Overweight
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (younger brother)
- Social history: Current smoker (5 cigarettes/day for 5 years; ~1.2 pack-years); Alcohol 5-6 drinks/week (1-2 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 500mg twice daily; Losartan (50 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Nitrofurantoin (100 mg twice daily for prophylaxis)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 64.3 kg; Height 162.6 cm; BMI 24.2 kg/m²; Blood pressure 131/73 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.3%; 9 months ago 7.9%; 6 months ago 8.1%; 3 months ago 8.2%; current 8.1%), FPG (12 months ago 219mg/dL; 9 months ago 205mg/dL; 6 months ago 204mg/dL; 3 months ago 212mg/dL; current 221mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 66.9kg; 9 months ago 64.9kg; 6 months ago 65.1kg; 3 months ago 65.9kg; current 64.3kg), Height (12 months ago 162.6cm; 9 months ago 162.6cm; 6 months ago 162.6cm; 3 months ago 162.6cm; current 162.6cm), BMI (12 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 25.0kg/m²; current 24.2kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 127mmHg; 9 months ago 129mmHg; 6 months ago 130mmHg; 3 months ago 129mmHg; current 131mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 77mmHg; 9 months ago 75mmHg; 6 months ago 76mmHg; 3 months ago 74mmHg; current 73mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 36U/L; 9 months ago 34U/L; 6 months ago 36U/L; 3 months ago 35U/L; current 33U/L), AST (12 months ago 17U/L; 9 months ago 16U/L; 6 months ago 12U/L; 3 months ago 18U/L; current 14U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.9mg/dL; current 0.9mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 37mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 39mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 37mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 36mL/min/1.73m²; current 36mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 220mg/g; 9 months ago 241mg/g; 6 months ago 247mg/g; 3 months ago 211mg/g; current 253mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 80mg/dL; 9 months ago 79mg/dL; 6 months ago 72mg/dL; 3 months ago 79mg/dL; current 76mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 43mg/dL; 9 months ago 46mg/dL; 6 months ago 47mg/dL; 3 months ago 46mg/dL; current 45mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 156mg/dL; 9 months ago 173mg/dL; 6 months ago 158mg/dL; 3 months ago 151mg/dL; current 163mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 10.0g/dL; 9 months ago 10.0g/dL; 6 months ago 10.0g/dL; 3 months ago 10.0g/dL; current 9.8g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
